description_long: This is a women's wedge sandal featuring a high, faux-wood platform heel and two wide, taupe-colored leather straps across the top. The wedge heel has a textured, woodgrain appearance, while the footbed is lightly contoured and cushioned for comfort. The open-toe design allows for breathability, and the backless, slip-on style makes it easy to wear. The upper straps are smooth and matte, contrasting with the slightly glossy, patterned heel. The sole appears to be made of a durable synthetic material, suitable for urban walking. The overall construction suggests a blend of style and comfort, ideal for casual or semi-formal urban settings.
description: A taupe leather wedge sandal with a faux-wood platform heel and two wide straps, featuring an open-toe, slip-on design. The heel has a woodgrain texture, and the footbed is cushioned for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wedge's full height, woodgrain heel, and both wide taupe straps.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design and the parallel placement of the two straps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wedge heel's curve and the smooth finish of the straps.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backless design and the heel's woodgrain texture.
